title: Senior Python Developer
description: We are seeking an experienced Python developer to join our backend team. You will work on building scalable APIs using FastAPI and Django, integrate with cloud services, and mentor junior developers.
requirements: 5+ years Python experience, FastAPI, Django, PostgreSQL, AWS, Docker, REST APIs, microservices architecture

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description: Join our ML team to build cutting-edge AI models. Work with large datasets, deploy models to production, and collaborate with data scientists on NLP and computer vision projects.
requirements: Machine learning, Python, TensorFlow, PyTorch, NLP, computer vision, scikit-learn, pandas, AWS SageMaker

title: Full Stack JavaScript Developer
description: Build modern web applications using React and Node.js. Work on both frontend and backend, implement responsive designs, and integrate with third-party APIs.
requirements: JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Node.js, Express, MongoDB, HTML, CSS, REST APIs, Git

title: Data Scientist
description: Analyze complex datasets, build predictive models, and provide actionable insights. Work with business stakeholders to solve real-world problems using data science and machine learning.
requirements: Python, R, machine learning, statistics, pandas, scikit-learn, SQL, data visualization, Tableau, communication skills

title: DevOps Engineer
description: Manage cloud infrastructure, implement CI/CD pipelines, and ensure system reliability. Work with Kubernetes, Docker, and AWS to automate deployments and monitoring.
requirements: AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, Jenkins, Terraform, Linux, Python, Bash, CI/CD, monitoring tools

title: Frontend React Developer
description: Create beautiful, responsive user interfaces using React and modern CSS frameworks. Collaborate with designers and backend developers to deliver exceptional user experiences.
requirements: React, JavaScript, TypeScript, HTML, CSS, Tailwind CSS, Redux, responsive design, Git, Figma

title: Backend Java Developer
description: Develop enterprise-grade backend systems using Java and Spring Boot. Work on microservices architecture, database optimization, and API development for large-scale applications.
requirements: Java, Spring Boot, microservices, PostgreSQL, REST APIs, Maven, JUnit, Docker, Kubernetes, agile

title: Mobile App Developer (iOS)
description: Build native iOS applications using Swift and SwiftUI. Work on consumer-facing apps with millions of users, implement new features, and optimize performance.
requirements: Swift, SwiftUI, iOS development, Xcode, REST APIs, Git, UIKit, Core Data, push notifications

title: Cloud Architect
description: Design and implement cloud infrastructure solutions on AWS. Lead cloud migration projects, optimize costs, and ensure security and compliance for enterprise clients.
requirements: AWS, Azure, cloud architecture, Terraform, security, networking, Lambda, S3, EC2, leadership

title: QA Automation Engineer
description: Develop automated testing frameworks and ensure software quality. Write test scripts, perform regression testing, and work closely with development teams.
requirements: Selenium, Python, Java, test automation, CI/CD, Jenkins, API testing, Postman, agile, problem solving

title: Product Manager (Technical)
description: Lead product development from concept to launch. Work with engineering, design, and business teams to define product roadmap and deliver features that delight users.
requirements: Product management, agile, Jira, technical background, communication, leadership, data analysis, user research

title: Database Administrator
description: Manage and optimize database systems. Ensure data integrity, implement backup strategies, and tune database performance for high-traffic applications.
requirements: PostgreSQL, MySQL, database optimization, SQL, backup and recovery, monitoring, Linux, scripting, security

title: Security Engineer
description: Protect systems and data from security threats. Conduct security audits, implement security measures, and respond to incidents. Work with penetration testing and vulnerability assessment.
requirements: Cybersecurity, penetration testing, network security, Python, Linux, security tools, incident response, compliance

title: UI/UX Designer
description: Create intuitive and beautiful user interfaces. Conduct user research, create wireframes and prototypes, and collaborate with developers to implement designs.
requirements: Figma, Adobe XD, user research, wireframing, prototyping, HTML, CSS, responsive design, communication

title: Blockchain Developer
description: Develop decentralized applications and smart contracts. Work with Ethereum, Solidity, and Web3 technologies to build blockchain solutions.
requirements: Solidity, Ethereum, Web3, smart contracts, JavaScript, blockchain, cryptography, Node.js, React
